Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiffs Claims And To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. DANA BURCH, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (tel: 415-986-5900) for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT PILOT44, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiffs Claims And To Stay Action Pending Arbitration.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "motion to compel arbitration of plaintiff's claims and to stay action pending arbitration" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
